title: config.rs: feed URL not validated as http/https on load
description:
LOCATION: src/config.rs:67-83, Config::validate()

FINDING: validate() only checks feed poll_interval format and watch path absoluteness. It does not validate that feed[i].url is an http:// or https:// URL. An operator typo like 'ftp://...' or a relative path will pass config validation and only fail at first poll time with an opaque reqwest error.

IMPACT: Operator configuration error gives no early diagnostic at server startup. Minor operational burden — not a security issue since the feed poller uses a separate client without the SsrfSafeResolver, but the early-fail principle means startup should catch this.
close_reason: Fixed: config.rs validates feed URLs start with http/https
